skill.name: Azure AI Document Translation SDK for Python
skill.description: This skill provides AI-powered document translation capabilities using Azure AI Document Translation service. It helps translate entire documents while preserving formatting and structure across multiple languages.
skill.summary: Translate documents with Azure AI while preserving formatting and structure
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files (0 lines) and detected no suspicious patterns. The skill provides guidance for using Azure AI Document Translation SDK which is a legitimate cloud service. No risk factors detected.

content.value_statement: This skill enables AI-powered document translation that preserves original formatting. It handles complex documents across multiple languages without manual reformatting.
actual_capabilities: Translate documents while preserving original formatting and structure
Support batch translation of multiple files across languages
Handle various document formats including PDF, Word, and more
Provide guidance on Azure Document Translation SDK usage in Python
Manage translation jobs and monitor progress
Process glossary and custom translation requirements
limitations: Requires valid Azure subscription and credentials
Translation quality depends on Azure service capabilities
File size limits apply based on Azure service quotas
Network connectivity required for Azure API calls

use_cases.title: Multi-language Documentation
use_cases.description: Translate technical documentation, user manuals, and help files into multiple languages while maintaining formatting.

use_cases.title: Business Document Localization
use_cases.description: Translate contracts, reports, and business correspondence between languages for international operations.

use_cases.title: Content Localization for Websites
use_cases.description: Convert website content and marketing materials for global audiences with consistent styling.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams and web content managers

prompt_templates.title: Basic Document Translation
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the Azure AI Document Translation skill to translate [input document] from English to [target language]. Preserve all formatting.

prompt_templates.title: Batch Translation
prompt_templates.prompt: Translate all documents in [folder path] from [source language] to [target languages]. Process them as a batch and maintain consistent terminology.

prompt_templates.title: Custom Glossary Translation
prompt_templates.prompt: Translate [document] using custom glossary terms from [glossary file]. Ensure industry-specific terminology is handled correctly.
prompt_templates.scenario: Using custom translation memory or terminology

prompt_templates.title: Automated Translation Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Set up an automated workflow that monitors [folder] for new documents and automatically translates them to [target languages] upon detection.

output_examples.input: Translate report.pdf from English to Spanish
output_examples.output: The translation job has been submitted to Azure Document Translation. Job ID: [uuid]. Status: Running. The translated document will be available at [output path] upon completion with original formatting preserved.

output_examples.input: Batch translate these 5 documents to French and German
output_examples.output: Created batch translation job with 5 documents. Target languages: French, German. Estimated completion time based on document size. Progress can be monitored using job ID. Results will be organized by target language in the output folder.

best_practices: Use dedicated Azure translator resources for production workloads to ensure reliability and performance
Implement proper error handling and retry logic for translation job failures
Validate translated content for accuracy before publishing, especially for critical documents
anti_patterns: Do not assume unlimited translation quotas - monitor usage and set up budget alerts
Avoid processing highly sensitive documents without proper data compliance review
Do not skip validation of translation output for technical or legal documents

faq.question: What document formats are supported?
faq.answer: Azure Document Translation supports common formats including PDF, Word (DOCX), Excel, PowerPoint, and plain text files. Support varies by format version and complexity.

faq.question: How does this skill handle formatting preservation?
faq.answer: The skill leverages Azure's format preservation capabilities to maintain original document structure, styling, and layout during translation.

faq.question: Do I need an Azure subscription?
faq.answer: Yes, you need an active Azure subscription with the Cognitive Services Translator resource configured. The skill requires valid API credentials.

faq.question: Can I use custom glossaries?
faq.answer: Yes, Azure Document Translation supports custom glossaries and translation memories to ensure consistent terminology across documents.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: Azure Translator supports over 100 languages and dialects. The exact list continues to expand as Azure updates the service.

faq.question: How are large documents handled?
faq.answer: Azure Document Translation handles large documents through async processing. The skill manages job submission and status tracking for files that exceed real-time processing limits.
